name: Become a Legend
text: Have units in 5 non-home systems that contain legendary planets or anomalies.

name: Centralize Galactic Trade
text: Spend 14 trade goods.

name: Command an Armada
text: Have 9 or more non-fighter ships in 1 non-home system.

name: Control the Borderlands
text: Have units in 5 non-Fracture systems on the edge of the game board other than your home system.

name: Found a Golden Age
text: Spend 20 resources.

name: Galvanize the People
text: Spend a total of 8 tokens from your tactic and/or strategy pools.

name: Hold Vast Reserves
text: Spend 9 influence, 9 resources, and 9 trade goods.

name: Manipulate Galactic Law
text: Spend 20 influence.

name: Master the Sciences
text: Control more readied planets than the combined total of 2 of your neighbors.

name: Patrol Vast Territories
text: Have units in 5 non-Fracture systems that do not contain planets.

name: Reclaim Ancient Monuments
text: Control 4 planets that have attachments.

name: Revolutionize Warfare
text: Have more neighbors than each 2 of your neighbors.

name: Subdue the Galaxy
text: Control 11 planets outside of The Fracture and your home system.

name: Amass Wealth
text: Spend 4 influence, 4 resources, and 4 trade goods.

name: Develop Weaponry
text: Have more non-fighter ships on the game board than each of 2 of your neighbors.

name: Diversify Research
text: Exhaust 3 planets that each have a different trait and 1 additional planet that has a technology specialty.

name: Engineer a Marvel
text: Have your flagship or a war sun adjacent to Mecatol Rex or another player's home system.

name: Erect a Monument
text: Spend 10 resources.

name: Expand Borders
text: Control 7 planets outside of The Fracture and your home system.

name: Explore Deep Space
text: Have units in 3 non-Fracture systems that do not contain planets.

name: Intimidate Council
text: Have ships in 2 non-Fracture systems that are adjacent to Mecatol Rex.

name: Lead from the Front
text: Spend a total of 4 tokens from your tactic and/or strategy pools.

name: Make History
text: Have units in 3 non-home systems that contain legendary planets or anomalies.

name: Negotiate Trade Routes
text: Spend 7 trade goods.

name: Populate the Outer Rim
text: Have units in 3 non-Fracture systems, other than your home system, that are on the edge of the game board and do not contain other players' units.

name: Raise a Fleet
text: Have 2 or more non-fighter ships in 2 non-home systems and 5 or more non-fighter ships in 1 other system that is not your home system.

name: Sway the Council
text: Spend 10 influence.
